projectDescription: Mav is an AI-powered lead engagement platform that automatically qualifies insurance leads via SMS and connects them to agents through live call transfers.
keyFeatures: AI-powered SMS lead engagement via Playbooks
Party Line live call transfers connecting leads to agents
CSV lead import with TCPA consent management
Marketing Sources with custom postURLs for lead tracking
Outbound webhook API for event and outcome subscriptions
Zapier integration for connecting to 1000+ apps
Slack notifications for lead events and outcomes
Playbook Alerts with webhook delivery for performance monitoring
Blocked Sources and DNC scrub services for lead quality control
Dynamic Texting Hours with local time zone support
Copilot summaries and call transcripts for completed Party Lines
publicApiSurface: Outbound webhook: activity_type, activity_label, activity_play_id, activity_note, activity_created_at
Outbound webhook: lead_id, lead_first_name, lead_last_name, lead_email, lead_opted_out, lead_created_at, lead_additional_info, lead_originators
Webhook event: started, double_opted_in, interested, stopped, completed, reengagement_sent
Webhook event: party_line_lead_attempted, party_line_lead_answered, party_line_rep_attempted, party_line_completed
Webhook event: catch_all_level1, catch_all_level2, catch_all_level3, copilot_paused, copilot_restarted
Webhook outcome: callback_requested, not_interested, qualified, unqualified, undeliverable, opted_out, party_line_completed
Playbook Alert webhook payload: alert.monitor_type, alert.alert_type, alert.alert_metric, metric.*, playbook.*
Zapier Trigger: New Event (started, interested, message_received, stopped, completed, qualified, party_line_*)
Zapier Trigger: New Outcome (unqualified, not_interested, opted_out, undeliverable, party_line_completed)
